title: PF1 Bleed Effects
description: Turns the Pathfinder 1e bleed and burning conditions into automated, recurring damage. Bleed deals its damage at the start of the afflicted actor's turn and can target hit points or ability damage/drain. Burning deals 1d6 fire per round, gated by a turn-start DC 15 Reflex save to put it out (using Roll Requests when installed, or a self-contained save-button card otherwise). Apply either via the @Bleed[...] / @Burning[...] enrichers or the module API.
